This Week in AI
===============

Hello from Medium! Here are the top AI stories you should read this week.

1. Claude 3.5 Sonnet Sets a New Benchmark
   Anthropic released their latest model this week. Read the full breakdown:
   https://anthropic.com/news/claude-3-5-sonnet

2. Building Agentic Pipelines with LangGraph
   A step-by-step guide to multi-agent workflows in production:
   https://medium.com/towards-data-science/langgraph-agentic-pipelines-abc123

3. RAG vs Fine-Tuning: Which Should You Use?
   A practical comparison for real-world deployments:
   https://medium.com/ml-practitioner/rag-vs-finetuning-def456

4. The Rise of MCP: Model Context Protocol Explained
   Everything developers need to know about Anthropic's open standard:
   https://medium.com/ai-engineering/mcp-explained-ghi789

Happy reading,
The Medium Team

--===============boundary42==
